title: Kingdom of Undying
description: RPG Modpack for Fabric. Adds some of RPG mechanics into Minecraft. It also uses several optimization mods, for your smooth experience.
body:
### [EN]
This modpack tries to do something medieval, fantasy-dark fantasy magic in vanilla-ish blocky way. I'm trying to find blocky mods to the game, not like "Cave Dweller" or something similar that is more suitable for another game rather than Minecraft.

**The modpack is under development, so expect a lot of changes, inconsistencies, bugs, crashes and more.**

Right now I'm trying to find mods with quest system, combat and other animations, bosses, medieval structures, proficiencies and magic stuff.

<!--> **Note before upgading this modpack: completely reinstall it or delete all mods, because some of them I will delete and later these mods will become useless and may start to conflict with some other mods.**-->

### [RU]
Этот модпак... да и так всё понятно, вы умеете пользоваться Google Translate (на крайний случай есть [Yandex переводчик](https://translate.yandex.ru/)).

# What's inside / Что внутри
<!--## Optimization
### Some mods
#### some text

adada-->

**[EN] Hint:**
> [🟠]()[🟢]() - These are links to the mod/resource pack/shader pages I used in this modpack, you can click on them.

> 🟢 - This one is for the **Modrinth** page of the mod.\
🟠 - This one is for the **Curseforge** page of the mod.\
⚫ - This one is **NOT** a link, and it means that the mod doesn't have a page on the Curseforge website (or on Modrinth too).

**[RU] Подсказка:**
> [🟠]()[🟢]() - Это ссылки на страницы модов/ресурс паков/шейдеров, которые я использовал в этом модпаке, вы можете кликать по ним.

> 🟢 - Эта для странички мода на сайте **Modrinth**.\
🟠 - Эта для странички мода на сайте **Curseforge**.\
⚫ - Это **НЕ** ссылка, она используется в случае, когда у мода нет странички на сайте Curseforge (или на Modrinth тоже).

<!-- 
| 🟠 🟢 | . |
| [🟠]() [🟢]() | . |
-->
